title: Comprehensive methodology for sample enrichment in EEG biomarker studies for Alzheimer’s risk classification
description: This dataset presents a comprehensive methodology for sample enrichment in electroencephalography (EEG) biomarker studies designed to classify Alzheimer's disease risk. The study employs systematic approaches to optimize participant selection and EEG data quality for improved biomarker identification and risk stratification in neurodegenerative disease research. The dataset includes EEG recordings from participants assessed for cognitive status, with detailed preprocessing protocols and enrichment criteria applied to enhance biomarker reliability for Alzheimer's risk classification.

funding_references.funder_name: Comité para el Desarrollo de la Investigación - CODI, Universidad de Antioquia
Comité para el Desarrollo de la Investigación (CODI)
